name: Alex and Jordan — Craft Beer + Hiking Couple

czech_beer_knowledge_depth.notes: Demonstrated excellent CZ extended profile depth: referenced Plato scale (desítka/dvanáctka), pour types (hladinka/šnyt/mlíko), coaster etiquette, zero-tolerance BAC, regions beyond Prague (Pilsen, České Budějovice, Strakonice, Třeboň, Broumy), both traditional and craft breweries, Bohemian vs Moravian distinction

recommend_booking.disclosure_text: This is a partner link. Toqui may earn a commission at no extra cost to you.

laugavegur_trail_knowledge.notes: Excellent IS extended profile depth: accurate trail distance (55km), duration (4 days standard), hut system (Ferðafélag Íslands), highland bus logistics (Trex/Reykjavik Excursions), river crossing safety (unbuckle waist strap), Fimmvörðuháls extension (25km), gear advice (no cotton rule, 3-layer system), water safety, food carrying requirements

usefulness_notes.trip_creation: Both trips created correctly with accurate titles, descriptions, and destination countries (CZ, IS). AI correctly created separate trips rather than modifying the existing one.
usefulness_notes.itinerary_quality: Outstanding. Czech itinerary covers 7 days with 10 items across brewery visits, craft bars, meals, and nightlife — hits deep-cut locations beyond tourist standards (Dudák, Matuška, Raven). Iceland itinerary provides accurate day-by-day Laugavegur trail breakdown with correct distances, durations, and the Fimmvörðuháls extension.
usefulness_notes.persona_handoff: Two successful expert handoffs: Jakub (CZ craft-beer/history) and Björn (IS adventure/nature). Both demonstrated deep, niche-specific knowledge consistent with extended location profiles. Handoffs were proactive and contextually appropriate.
usefulness_notes.overall: Exceptional test run. Extended location profiles for CZ and IS work beautifully with niche themes (craft-beer, hiking). AI demonstrated domain expertise far beyond surface-level travel advice — Czech beer culture (Plato scale, pour types, pub etiquette) and Iceland hiking logistics (hut booking, highland buses, river crossing safety) were thoroughly covered.

extended_profile_coverage.notes: Both CZ and IS are extended profiles (not core 4). Both performed excellently with niche theme combinations.

summary: All 3 test phases passed. Czech Beer Heritage Tour (10 itinerary items, expert 'Jakub') and Iceland Hiking: Laugavegur Trail (7 itinerary items, expert 'Björn') created as separate trips. Extended location profiles (CZ, IS) demonstrated deep niche knowledge. No bugs found.
